nasb.text: Do not rejoice, O Israel, with exultation like the nations! For you have played the harlot, forsaking your God. You have loved harlots’ earnings on every threshing floor.

esv.text: Rejoice not, O Israel! Exult not like the peoples; for you have played the whore, forsaking your God. You have loved a prostitute’s wages on all threshing floors.

cnv.text: 以色列啊！不要歡喜；不要像外族人一樣快樂， 因為你行了邪淫，離開你的　神， 在各打穀場上喜愛賣淫的賞賜。

ccb.text: 以色列啊， 不要欢喜快乐， 不要像外族人那样欢喜快乐！ 因为你对你的上帝不忠不贞， 在各麦场上喜爱卖淫得资财。
